subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! Give thanks unto God, thy Lord, the Lord of the Most Great Throne, for He hath strengthened thee amidst the peoples and drawn thee nigh unto the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم اشکر الله ربک رب العرش الاعظم انه ایدک بین الامم و قربک الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
